document.title: Installation & User manual for ADD Abyz Digital Detector
document.documentType: Installation & User Manual and Service Manual

sourceSummary.oneLine: Installation, use, safety, maintenance, warranty, service, and EMC information for the ADD Abyz Digital Detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports installation, operation, maintenance, service setup, and safety/EMC documentation for the ADD digital flat panel X-ray detector.
keyPoints: ADD is described as a wired or wireless digital flat panel detector for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy in adults and children.
The device is not to be used for mammography or direct cardiac application.
The manual identifies Class I or internally powered protection and Type B applied part protection for the front panel.
Calibration is required to acquire a proper image and is stated to be performed once every year for stabilized detector condition.
The EMC declaration states compliance with IEC 60601-1-2 EMC standards for medical devices.

evidence.claim: The document is an Installation & User manual for ADD Abyz Digital Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Installation & User manual for ADD Abyz Digital Detector

evidence.claim: The document version is A-TCF-5-050 Version 0.1 dated 2020.05.10.
ADD is a wired or wireless digital flat panel detector for digital radiography systems.
evidence.evidenceText: The ADD are wired or wireless digital flat panel detectors that have been designed for faster, more streamlined approach to digital radiography systems.
evidence.pageTarget: ADD Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector

evidence.claim: ADD is indicated for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy in adults and children.
evidence.evidenceText: ADD (Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector) is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children.

evidence.claim: ADD is intended to replace film based radiographic diagnostic systems and support real-time diagnosis and treatment planning.
evidence.evidenceText: It is intended to replace film based radiographic diagnostic systems and provide more precise case diagnosis and treatment planning on a real time basis for physicians and radiologists.

evidence.claim: ADD is not for mammography or direct cardiac application.
evidence.evidenceText: Not to be used for mammography and direct cardiac application.

evidence.claim: The intended patient population includes radiographic imaging of body parts such as head, chest, spinal, abdominal, hand, foot and internal organs.
evidence.evidenceText: Radiographic imaging of human body parts such as head, Chest, spinal, abdominal, particular, hand, foot and other internal organs.

evidence.claim: The intended user conditions include radiologist, familiarity with the user manual, and English language understanding.
evidence.evidenceText: Conditions that satisfy both of the following: a) Radiologist b) Familiarizing yourself with the User Manual c) The intended user's language is understandable: English

evidence.claim: The device protection type is Class I or internally powered.
evidence.evidenceText: Protection type: Class I or internally powered

evidence.claim: The detector front panel is Type B applied part for protection against electric shock.
evidence.evidenceText: The degree of protection against electric shock: Type B applied part for front panel of digital flat panel X-ray detector

evidence.claim: The detector uses a-Si TFT sensor and CsI scintillator.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensor Type a-Si TFT; Scintillator CsI

evidence.claim: The detector supports 1Giga-bit Ethernet and IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n Wi-Fi.
evidence.evidenceText: Wi-Fi IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n; Communication 1Giga-bit Ethernet

evidence.claim: The detector trigger modes include Normal Mode and AED Mode.
evidence.evidenceText: Trigger Mode Normal Mode AED Mode (Auto Exposure Detection Mode)

evidence.claim: The power supply box input is 100-240 V AC 50/60 Hz 1.0A Class I or 24VDC 3.0A, with 16 VDC 3.0A output.
evidence.evidenceText: Input (100-240) V~ (50/60) Hz 1.0A Class I or 24VDC 3.0A Output 16 VDC 3.0A

evidence.claim: Calibration is required to acquire a proper image.
evidence.evidenceText: Calibration shall be performed to acquire a proper image. The image will not be clear enough without calibration.

evidence.claim: Calibration is stated to be performed once every year for stabilized detector condition.
evidence.evidenceText: Calibration shall be performed once every one year for stabilized detector condition.

evidence.claim: Inspection list includes daily cable, plug, connector, cover, part, and LED checks, half-year recalibration, and yearly performance checks.
evidence.evidenceText: Check if cables are not damaged Daily; Check if plugs and connectors are not loose or damaged Daily; Check if cover or part is not damaged Daily; Check the LED indicator Daily; Re-Calibration Half Year; Check the performance of the product by doing test shots with Phantom or resolution chart Yearly

evidence.claim: The equipment complies with IEC 60601-1-2 EMC standards for medical devices.
evidence.evidenceText: This equipment complies with IEC 60601-1-2 EMC standards for medical devices.

evidence.claim: RF emissions compliance is listed as CISPR 11 Group 1 and Class A.
evidence.evidenceText: RF emissions CISPR 11 Group 1; RF emissions CISPR 11 Class A

evidence.claim: United States federal law restricts sale of the device to or on the order of a physician.
evidence.evidenceText: Federal law (USA) restricts this device to sale by or on the order of a physician

evidence.claim: The warranty section lists product lifetime as 5 years from sales date and warranty as 3 years from sales date.
evidence.evidenceText: Life Time 5 years from sales date Warranty 3 years from sales date

evidence.claim: The service center identifies H&abyz in Korea as headquarters and JaviTech e.K in Germany as European Authorized Representative.
evidence.evidenceText: Head Quarters – H&abyz (Korea) ... European Authorized Representative (EC REP) – JaviTech e.K (Germany)

reviewFlags.reason: Authority signal is FDA from source metadata and source path, but the manual text itself does not state FDA clearance, 510(k) number, submission status, or FDA document status.
The productSignal metadata lists HAD/A/F 1417-1717, but the manual text identifies the product/model as ADD and Abyz Digital Detector; no HAD/A/F model number appears in the extracted text.
Some OCR/text extraction quality issues are present, including misspellings and table formatting loss such as 'Batter Recharger', 'Error Massages', and missing units in temperature values.
